scores.correctness_notes: The agent provides a Python API walkthrough which is useful, but the gold standard indicates the charmlibs docs focus on interface specifications/data schemas (application-data with name/model/port, unit-data with host), not the Python library API. The agent also uses v2 while gold standard recommends v1.
scores.hallucination_notes: IngressPerAppRequirer is confirmed real per gold standard, but IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent, strip_prefix parameter, and event.url property are not validated by the gold standard and may be fabricated or inaccurate. The use of v2 when v1 is the recommended version is also a minor inaccuracy.
